reviews.comment:
Tuvimos que pasar un rato largo por un desperfecto en el auto y la verdad que la atención de la gente del shop fue súper amable y  los baños súper cuidados

(Translated by Google)
We had to spend a long time there because of a problem with the car, and the truth is that the service from the shop staff was super friendly and the restrooms were very well maintained.

reviews.comment:
todo bien, me recuerda a mi infancia y mantiene la estética vieja delas estaciones ACA. Muy pintoresco

(Translated by Google)
Everything's great, it reminds me of my childhood and maintains the old aesthetic of the ACA stations. Very picturesque.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21wNmRsQk9hRWhuZUY5eE5HWnBhMTlNZGxBMWRtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Una parada excelente cada vez que voy rumbo a la costa. Tienen una gran variedad  y una calidad notable en todo, utilizan vajilla en la cafetería  y una atención a la mesa muy cálida y prolija por los mozos. El lugar está muy limpio, el estacionamiento es adecuado y en general se nota que conservan ese toque tradicional que uno espera y aprecia. Sin duda, un lugar que nunca decepciona.

(Translated by Google)
An excellent stop every time I head to the coast. They have a great variety and remarkable quality in everything, they use fine china in the café, and the waiters provide very warm and attentive service. The place is very clean, the parking is adequate, and overall, you can tell they've maintained that traditional touch that one expects and appreciates. Without a doubt, a place that never disappoints.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxa1owWkpVMVpoYWxkeVNVaGpjbUZKVURGalVVRRAB
